title: Teknician Copper Golems
description: This resource pack changes Copper Golems to look like TangoTek's Teknicians using client side mods.
body:
This Resource Pack works with client side mods Entity Model Features & Entity Texture Features to turn Copper Golems into Tango Tek & Hoffen's Teknicians.

There are new more detailed textures for the classic, and worn down versions for the oxidized variants. The eyes turn off for the posable statues, and the waxed variants display as such in the inventory. There's also a new model for when an Iron Golem gives them a poppy, and they add it to a flower pot on their head.

This should work as long as you have updated versions of EMF & ETF and the corresponding Minecraft Version. Those mods are supported across Fabric, Forge, Neoforge, & Quilt, but only Fabric can be guaranteed.

Credit to Hoffen, for the design and early model.
